titleStmt.title: SII 34.67: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 67. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is a counterpart of the record found in No. 71 below. On king's order the dēvadāna land that was held under cultivation lease (uḻavaḍai) by a Kurugāḍi-Kiḻaiyān Kūttan who had married the sister of Kiḷinallūr-kiḻavan Āḍavallāṉ, was sold in royal auction (Rājarāja-peruvilai) and the sale amount was deposited in the government treasury.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 10 7 tu drokittu daṇṭippuṇṭa kiḷinallūr kiḻavaṉ Ā
ṭavallāṉu mivaṉaṭutta Uṟavumuṟaiyārum kāṇiyu maṭimaiyum rājarājap peruvilai
viṟṟuk kācōṭukkat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉamaiyil kiḷinalūr kiḻavaṉ Uṭaṉ piṟan
tāḷaik koṇṭa kurukāṭi kiḻaiyān kūttaṉukku vikkirama cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟai
kkūṟṟattu tirukkāṟkōṭiśvavaramuṭaiyār tēvatāṉam vaṇṇamāṉa maturāṉtaka
nallūril Ivaṉuḻavaṭaiyāṉa nilam kku Uḻavaṭai prāptikku vilai matitta
kācu 7 100 5 10 Ikkāceḻunūṟṟaimpatum Oṭukkiṉapaṭikkuk kaiccāttiyāvatuḷ Iti
l Oṭukkiṉa kācu 7 100 5 10 Ikkāceḻunūṟṟaimpatukku Ivai paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiyāṉ neḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
